name: COCA COLA CO
business: The Coca-Cola Company is a total beverage company that sells beverage products bearing its trademarks in more than 200 countries and territories. It owns or licenses and markets numerous beverage brands including Coca-Cola, Sprite, Fanta, and others. The company generates revenue by selling concentrates and syrups to independent bottling partners, and also through finished product operations.

exposures.sentence: The Coca-Cola Company is a total beverage company, and beverage products bearing our trademarks, sold in the United States since 1886, are now sold in more than 200 countries and territories.

The rapid growth of e commerce may create additional consumer price deflation by, among other things, facilitating comparison shopping, and could potentially threaten the value of some of our legacy route-to-market strategies and thus negatively affect revenues.
We are also subject to various federal, state and international laws and regulations related to cybersecurity, privacy and data protection

Disruption of our supply chain, including increased commodity, raw material, packaging, energy, transportation and other input costs, may adversely affect our financial condition or results of operations.
Adverse weather conditions may affect the supply of agricultural commodities from which key ingredients for our products are derived and manufactured.
the effects or perceived effects of the usage of weight-loss drugs on consumption patterns
If we are not successful in our efforts to digitalize the Coca-Cola system, our financial results could be negatively affected.
